title: Assorted Colors Mini Plastic Pen Highlighters, 6 cm (Pack of 6) - Fruity Scented, Perfect for School and Home Use
features: VIBRANT ASSORTMENT: Enjoy a spectrum of color with our mini highlighters featuring six vivid hues, violet, blue, green, yellow, orange, and pink, ideal for organizing your notes in a rainbow of shades.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Made from durable plastic, these highlighters are built to last, ensuring long-lasting visibility for your important texts without damaging paper or bleeding through.
COMPACT CONVENIENCE: At just 6cm in length, these mini pen highlighters are designed for portability. Tuck them easily into pockets, pencil cases, or planners for on-the-go highlighting.
MULTIPURPOSE USE: Perfect tools for school, home, or office use. Whether you're a student, teacher, or professional, these scented mini highlighters are versatile for any annotating task.

FRUITY SCENTED PLEASURE: The addition of fruity scents to these mini highlighters adds an enjoyable sensory experience to studying and organizing. The scents are subtle yet pleasant, providing a refreshing break from the usual scent of highlighters.
description: Add some amazing designs while using these mini highlighters.
